meaning: n.两段时期中间之时间,间隔的时间),戏剧或歌剧两幕间,圣诗等两段之间之间歇
examples: There will now be a short interlude.
Apart from a brief interlude of peace, the war lasted nine years.
Interlude: a Short, Not Too Scary, Guide to rsa.
But he and his lieutenants have long talked of looking beyond the Oslo interlude.
It was an endearing interlude, and for many attendees, probably the highlight of the keynote.
